title: MitosisV2
description: A Mod pack I made for my friends on a discord server that has the Create mod and some custom KubeJS crafting and items
body: This mod pack includes Ad_Astra, CreateMod, KubeJS, and quality-of-life mods to create a fun custom experience. This mod pack is customizable with updated/enhanced sounds, footsteps, and menu experience. I am slowly developing this mod pack, and there is no set progression line. Just some mods to screw around with. I highly recommend removing HT's TreeChop and adding FTB Ultimine as I'm not allowed to put it in this pack for licensing reasons. I AM WORKING ON A PROGRESSION
